message:
docs(config): clarify workflows.enabled config format

Update example config to show the correct format for enabling workflows:
- Change from: enabled = true (ambiguous boolean)
- Change to: enabled = ["handle_compaction", "handle_usage_limits"]

This clarifies that workflows are enabled by name, not a global toggle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5316,8 +5316,8 @@ retention_max_mb = 1000
 enabled_packs = ["builtin:core"]
 
 [workflows]
-# Enable workflow execution
-enabled = true
+# Enabled workflows (by name)
+enabled = ["handle_compaction", "handle_usage_limits"]
 # Maximum concurrent workflows
 max_concurrent = 3
